events.label: assistant
events.text: Written to `/app/answer.json`. The missing end seal is a code/manufacturer-instruction violation under NEC 427.29 — it leaves the heating cable's bus wires and cable end exposed to moisture ingress, a well-known cause of ground faults and fire risk. Since the work is only rough-complete (not yet insulated/closed out), it's correctable now: `decision: fail`, `risk: high`, with corrective actions to install the proper end seal kit and verify insulation resistance before covering.
